[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101101000 4
1 101011101 6
2 101000011 4
3 011110010 5
4 110110101 6
5 101101100 5
6 100101001 4
7 100011001 4

01 111111111 a
12 111101010 6
23 111111101 8
34 111100111 7
45 100111011 6
56 111011111 8
67 110110101 6 match 4
70 001111110 6

02 111101011 7
